hero.description: I help local businesses and startups ship premium web experiences, intelligent automations, and AI products that actually move the needle.

about.description1: I design, build and ship production-grade web platforms and AI systems end-to-end. From bespoke marketing sites to GPT-powered internal tools, I partner with founders and SMBs that care about craft.
about.description2: My sweet spot: small teams that need a senior generalist who can move from Figma to Express to fine-tuning a model without losing sight of the business.

services.title1: Everything you need to ship a
services.description: Whether you're starting from scratch or layering AI onto an existing platform, I can take it from idea to production.

web.title: Web Development
web.desc: Business sites, portfolios, e-commerce, custom web apps, and landing pages — all hand-built for performance.

automation.title: AI Automation
automation.desc: Replace repetitive ops with intelligent workflows that connect your tools, route work, and report back.

aiApps.title: AI-Powered Apps
aiApps.desc: Custom AI chatbots, assistants, search and recommendation systems built around your product and data.

integration.title: AI Integration
integration.desc: Embed GPT, vector search, analytics and assistants into your existing stack without breaking it.

design.title: UI / UX Design
design.desc: Premium interfaces, dashboards and design systems responsive, accessible, and a joy to use.

strategy.title: Strategy & Audits
strategy.desc: Not sure where AI fits? I audit your workflows and map a pragmatic roadmap with real ROI.

contact.description: The more details you share, the more accurate the proposal will be.
